summary: Intent Alignment Contract v2.1 implementation complete. Created emotiond/self_report_contract.py with SelfReportContract dataclass including intent, intent_alignment_score (0-1), intent_drift flag, and contract_version bumped to v2.1. Added intent validation logic with classify_intent() and calculate_intent_alignment() functions. Updated self_report_check.py with new violation types (INTENT_DRIFT, INTENT_MISALIGNMENT) and integrated intent alignment checking. Updated gates.py with intent_alignment gate and shadow mode contract validation. Created comprehensive unit tests (33 tests all passing) in tests/test_intent_alignment_contract.py.
